betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Impulse Itemduct§f

§aDouble the speed of item transfer through your duct network using Energized Glowstone infusion!§f

§bImpulse Itemducts§f move items twice as fast as standard itemducts. Produced in a §bFluid Transposer§f by infusing a basic itemduct with §bEnergized Glowstone§f.

§6Recipe (Fluid Transposer)§f:
§b• 1× Itemduct§f + §e200 mB§f §bEnergized Glowstone§f → §e2× Impulse Itemduct§f (§e800 RF§f).

§6Speed Comparison§f:
- §bItemduct§f: §e40 ticks per block§f.
- §bImpulse Itemduct§f: §e20 ticks per block§f (2× faster).

§eTip§f: Combine with higher-tier servos for maximum throughput on busy item lines.
